title: Successful payment with valid credit card details
preconditions: User is logged in and has items in the cart. User is on the checkout page.
steps: User selects "Credit Card" as payment method.
User enters valid credit card number, expiry date, CVV, and cardholder name.
User clicks "Pay Now" button.
expected_result:
- Payment is authorized and captured successfully.
- Order confirmation page is displayed.
- A unique transaction ID is generated and displayed.
- User receives an order confirmation email.

title: Payment fails with invalid credit card number
preconditions: User is logged in and has items in the cart. User is on the checkout page.
steps: User selects "Credit Card" as payment method.
User enters an invalid credit card number (e.g., incorrect length, invalid Luhn algorithm check), valid expiry date, valid CVV, and cardholder name.
User clicks "Pay Now" button.
expected_result:
- An error message "Invalid card number" is displayed.
- Payment is not processed.
- User remains on the checkout page.

title: Payment fails with an expired credit card
preconditions: User is logged in and has items in the cart. User is on the checkout page.
steps: User selects "Credit Card" as payment method.
User enters a valid credit card number, an expired expiry date, valid CVV, and cardholder name.
User clicks "Pay Now" button.
expected_result:
- An error message "Expired card" or "Card has expired" is displayed.
- Payment is rejected.
- User remains on the checkout page.

title: Payment declines due to insufficient funds
preconditions: User is logged in and has items in the cart. User is on the checkout page. Test environment configured to simulate insufficient funds for a specific card.
steps: User selects "Credit Card" as payment method.
User enters valid credit card details for a card with insufficient funds.
User clicks "Pay Now" button.
expected_result:
- A decline message "Insufficient funds" or "Payment declined" is displayed.
- Payment is not processed.
- User remains on the checkout page.

title: Payment gateway timeout offers retry option
preconditions: User is logged in and has items in the cart. User is on the checkout page. Payment gateway configured to simulate a timeout.
steps: User selects "Credit Card" as payment method.
User enters valid credit card details.
User clicks "Pay Now" button.
Wait for payment gateway timeout.
expected_result:
- An error message indicating a timeout (e.g., "Payment gateway unresponsive, please try again") is displayed.
- A "Retry Payment" option is presented to the user.
- Payment is not processed.

title: Payment fails with invalid CVV
preconditions: User is logged in and has items in the cart. User is on the checkout page.
steps: User selects "Credit Card" as payment method.
User enters valid credit card number, valid expiry date, an invalid CVV (e.g., incorrect length or value), and cardholder name.
User clicks "Pay Now" button.
expected_result:
- A validation error message "Invalid CVV" or "Please check your CVV" is displayed.
- Payment is not processed.
- User remains on the checkout page.

title: System prevents duplicate payment submission
preconditions: User is logged in and has items in the cart. User is on the checkout page.
steps: User selects "Credit Card" as payment method.
User enters valid credit card details.
User rapidly clicks "Pay Now" button multiple times (e.g., double click).
expected_result:
- Only one payment transaction is initiated and processed successfully.
- The "Pay Now" button is disabled or shows a loading state after the first click to prevent subsequent clicks.
- Order confirmation is displayed once for the single successful payment.

title: System handles network failure during payment transaction
preconditions: User is logged in and has items in the cart. User is on the checkout page. Test environment configured to simulate a network interruption during payment processing.
steps: User selects "Credit Card" as payment method.
User enters valid credit card details.
User clicks "Pay Now" button.
Simulate a network interruption immediately after submission but before payment gateway response.
expected_result:
- The system attempts to recover or provides a clear error message (e.g., "Network error, please check your connection and try again").
- The payment status is correctly reflected (e.g., pending, failed, or retried) without creating duplicate orders or charges.
- User is guided on how to proceed (e.g., retry, check order history).

title: System handles partial payment success (authorization success, capture failure)
preconditions: User is logged in and has items in the cart. User is on the checkout page. Payment gateway configured to simulate authorization success but capture failure.
steps: User selects "Credit Card" as payment method.
User enters valid credit card details.
User clicks "Pay Now" button.
expected_result:
- The system detects the capture failure.
- An appropriate error message is displayed to the user (e.g., "Payment authorized but could not be captured. Please try again or contact support.").
- The order status reflects the partial success (e.g., "Payment Authorized - Capture Failed").
- No charge is made to the user's card.

title: System prevents payment with currency mismatch
preconditions: User is logged in and has items in the cart. User is on the checkout page. The system is configured to process payments in a specific currency (e.g., USD).
steps: User selects "Credit Card" as payment method.
User enters valid credit card details for a card primarily associated with a different currency (e.g., EUR) and attempts to pay for an order in USD.
User clicks "Pay Now" button.
expected_result:
- The system either automatically converts the currency (if supported and configured) or displays an error message "Currency mismatch" or "Payment currency not supported for this card".
- Payment is not processed if currency conversion is not supported.
